header.title: Reach
header.description: Find prospects, generate first-touch emails, and launch outbound sequences.

campaigns.createHint: Launch sets the Gmail sending alias (sender) + sales calendar, then the arsenal runs autonomously.
campaigns.count: {count, plural, =0 {No campaigns} one {# campaign} other {# campaigns}}
campaigns.empty: No campaigns yet. Use Launch campaign to create your first one.

scraper.leadsCount: {count, plural, =0 {No companies} one {# company} other {# companies}} · Full list
scraper.noLeads: No leads yet — run the scraper for this campaign.
scraper.selectToView: Select a campaign above to view its scraped leads.

progress.hint: This can take a few minutes — leads attach to the campaign as they're found. You can leave this page.
progress.foundNew: {count, plural, one {# new lead found} other {# new leads found}}
progress.totalLeads: {count, plural, =0 {No leads yet} one {# lead for this campaign} other {# leads for this campaign}}
progress.failedUnknown: The run could not be completed. The Lead Satellite agent may not be connected yet.
progress.moreInCampaigns: More leads for this campaign in the Campaigns tab.

scraper.selectLabel: Select a campaign to scrape leads for
scraper.targetsTitle: Targets · the niche this campaign scrapes
scraper.targetsHint: Leads attach to the selected campaign and appear under it in the Campaigns tab.

empty.title: No campaigns to scrape
empty.description: Launch a campaign first — the Lead Scraper attaches the leads it finds to it.

pick.title: Pick a campaign
pick.description: Choose a campaign above to view and tune the niche targets the scraper runs for it.

notWired.title: Email Generator isn't wired yet
notWired.description: First-touch email generation runs through the Ammo Forge arsenal stage and per-campaign drafts. A standalone generator is coming in a later phase.

notWired.title: Sequence Sender isn't wired yet
notWired.description: Multi-step outbound sequences are sent by the REACH BAZOOKA arsenal stage on its own schedule. A standalone sequence builder is coming in a later phase.

generator.orgDefault: Showing the org-wide default template. Edit it in the Templates tab — per-campaign edits here are not used.

field.focusHint: Used by the default email template ({{Type}} / {{IndustryFocus}} / {{TenderFocus}}).

default.title: Default email template
default.intro: The org-wide default the Reach Bazooka sends when a campaign has no template of its own. Use the placeholders

import.title: Import from JSON
import.outro: object (stored keys also work) to fill the three rounds above.

toast.loadFailed: Could not load the default template.
toast.invalidJson: Invalid JSON — could not parse the template.
toast.expectedObject: Expected a JSON object with the three rounds.
toast.noRounds: No COLD / FOLLOWUP / FINALPUSH rounds found in the JSON.
toast.readFailed: Could not read the uploaded file.

engine.title: Growth engine

status.active: {count, plural, =0 {No active campaigns} one {# active} other {# active}}

engine.syncHint: Import recent runs + counts from n8n's execution history.

funnel.title: Outcome funnel
funnel.description: What the engine produced this week, from leads to booked meetings.

niches.title: Top niches by industry
niches.description: The niches with the most live prospects right now.

header.title: Sectors
header.description: Your sectors — niches grouped by industry, each with the target archetypes the Lead Scraper hunts.

empty.title: No niches yet
empty.description: Niches are created when you launch a campaign from the Growth Engine (AIM).

manage.description: Manage the targets the arsenal scrapes for this niche.

industry.createDialogDescription: Industries group niches for search and reporting only — they never touch lead research.

niche.createDialogDescription: Niches are the segments the arsenal scrapes. Assign an industry now, or leave it unassigned.
niche.deleteError: This niche still has campaigns or prospects — reassign or archive them first.

aim.dialogDescription: Lock & Load launches the campaign: the ERP provisions the Drive folder via n8n, then the arsenal runs autonomously.
aim.nicheHintNew: New niche — it’ll be created for your org on launch.
aim.nicheHintExisting: Pick an existing niche or type a new name.
aim.nicheEmptyLink: create one on the Sector page
aim.gmailHint: Auto-generated from niche · country · zone · year — edit to override.
aim.senderHint: Gmail alias used as the From identity.
aim.calendarHint: Meetings for this campaign are booked into this Google calendar.
aim.calendarNotConnected: Google Calendar isn't connected — the organization's default calendar will be used.
aim.toastDraft: Saved as draft ({project}) — the AIM webhook isn't configured yet.
